records.ety: [L. inaestimabilis: cf. F. inestimable. See In- not, and Estimate.]

defs: Incapable of being estimated or computed; especially, too valuable or excellent to be measured or fully appreciated; above all price; as, inestimable rights or privileges.
quotes: But above all, for thine inestimable love.
Science is too inestimable for expression by a money standard.
